item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "printf 'JSON mode: '
jq -r '.mode' longhorizon-work/scenario-02/config/onboarding.json
printf '%s\\n' 'Markdown mode references:'
rg -n -i 'streaming mode|--mode' longhorizon-work/scenario-02/docs/onboarding.md"
